title: Test Plan
description: Writing of a test plan following a template for a project I worked on as a developer during my time at Sciensano.

title: Test Cases
description: Description of the various test cases I've later implemented in my Playwright setup. Covering anonymous users cases and admin users cases as well as integrations cases.

title: Playwright Setup
description: This is a setup of a Playwright project for a Drupal application using the Page Object Model and the Data Driven Testing methodology. The project tests the full CRUD of every content types available on this Drupal instance for various user roles.
